---
title: "Autodiff"
bibliography: autodiff.bib
---

## Sources

---
nocite: |
  @*
---

::: {#refs}
:::

## How to differentiate

### Basics

- Definition of derivative
- Motivation
- Differentiable programming

### The four horsemen

- Manual
- Symbolic
- Numeric
- Algorithmic
- Computational graph

## The modes of AD

### Forward mode

- Linear maps
- Chain rule
- Link with matrices
- Examples

### Reverse mode

- Adjoint linear maps
- Reverse chain rule
- Link with transposed matrices
- Examples

### Complexity

- Time complexity
- Space complexity
- Checkpointing

### Full matrices

- Choosing a mode
- Solving linear systems

## Implementation

### Principles

- Non-standard interpretation
- Operator overloading
- Source transformation

### Software

- Available libraries
- Limitations

## Going further

### Challenges

- Branches, loops
- Non-smooth functions
- Approximations
- Solvers as layers

### Solutions

- Writing rules
- Implicit function theorem for continuous optimization layers
- Smoothing for discrete optimization layers
